trans-unit.source: The offer has been closed by the seller and is no longer accepting orders.
The items for the offer have arrived. This chat will close to new messages on .
The offer has been marked as completed.
The offer was updated by the seller.
Your order in the offer was removed because the seller reduced the available stock ().
The items for the offer you joined have arrived.
Your offer reached its closing time fully sold out and has been closed automatically.
The offer you joined has been closed.
The offer is now complete. Please proceed with payment.
The offer you joined was deleted by the seller. Your order has been cancelled.
Your offer sold out before its closing time and has been closed automatically.
cancelled their order in your offer.
placed an order in your offer.
updated their order in your offer.
Your payment for the offer has been confirmed by the seller.
uploaded a payment proof for your offer.
The seller reduced available stock for '' in the offer, so your quantity was adjusted to .
The offer you joined was changed in ways that may affect your order. Please review.
The offer you joined was updated by the seller.
Your offer's closing time was reached and it has been closed automatically, not fully sold out.
Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and periods
By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
You haven't placed any orders yet.
Are you sure you want to delete this item?
Please fill in the closing and arrival dates.
Items must arrive on or after the offer closing date.
On the same day, items must arrive at or after the offer closing time.
You already have an existing order in this offer.

Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
This action cannot be undone.
Failed to upload proof of payment:
Are you sure you want to remove this item from your cart?
Failed to mark items as arrived:

Are you sure you want to delete this offer?
This action cannot be undone.
This information will be displayed publicly so be careful what you share.
This information is only displayed to you.
Are you sure you want to Sign out?
We may still send you important notifications about your account outside of your notification settings.
Switch to a darker theme to reduce eye strain in low-light environments.
A buyer joins, places, updates, or cancels an order on one of your offers, or submits proof of payment.
One of your offers closes automatically — either it reached its closing time or sold out.
An offer you've joined is edited, closed, deleted, or completed, or your order on it is adjusted or removed.
Your payment is confirmed, or the items you ordered have arrived.
You receive a new direct or group chat message.
Arrival date cannot be in the past.
Arrival time cannot be in the past.
Please set your location first before creating a request.
Invalid file type. Please upload .jpg, .jpeg, or .png file.
File size too large. Maximum size is MB.
Search for a building or address
Account number must contain only numbers

Are you sure you want to delete this payment method?
This action cannot be undone.
